resources.string: Upload an XML file from your device
All your %1$d files were successfully uploaded!
"Sorry, we couldn't upload these files. The format is not correct or the files are corrupted."
"Sorry, we couldn't upload this file. The format is not correct or the file is corrupted."
Swipe here to position next point, then tap here to place it
Swipe to add a new point
The media you selected could not be added.
Some of the media you selected could not be added.
Swipe here to adjust Z position
This feature is only available to Alight Motion Members.
Please check your internet connection and try again.
There was a problem loading the ad
I agree to the collection and use of my personal information
I am 14 years old or older

Your use of Alight Motion is governed by the Alight Creative Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, portions of which apply exclusively to users with Alight Creative accounts. In order to create or sign in to an Alight Creative account, for compliance with PIPA and related privacy laws, you must read and consent to the collection and use of personal information as follows, and the Terms of Service.
Consent for Collection and Use of Personal Information and Terms of Service

"You must agree to these updated terms to continue using Alight Motion.
If you do not agree, please uninstall Alight Motion."
I agree to the Alight Creative [a href=https://alightcreative.com/tos/]Terms of Service[/a] and [a href=https://alightcreative.com/privacy/]Privacy Policy[/a]
To use audio, video, or images in your project, Alight Motion requires access to your media.

"This project uses external video, photo or audio media.
To preview, edit, or share this project, Alight Motion requires access to your media."

"Effects are central to Alight Motion, so we’ve made it easier for you to find and use them.
• Presets help you quickly apply common effect settings • Effects and presets can be starred as favorites, for quick one-touch access • The Search Box lets you quickly find exactly the effect you want • The new Effect Guide explains how to use each effect • Many individual effects have been updated and improved "
Welcome to the New Effect Browser!
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
Please try again in a few minutes. If the issue persists, contact our support.
Please check your connection and try again.
Remove ads and enjoy all Pro Features of Alight Motion
Remove ads and enjoy all Pro Features of Alight Motion and Cloud Backup
Earn shopping vouchers and more when other creators use your templates. Get rewarded for sharing your creativity with the world!
"A new library for templates and presets... Keypad entry for adjusting values... And a whole batch of new effects!"
Select a layer to save all its animations and effects as a preset that you can share with others and use in any project.
Effortlessly customize any template by quickly replacing media with your own amazing content.
"That’s right: Speed control is finally here. Make smooth velocity edits for an impressive effect"
A verification email will be sent to the new address.
You must authenticate again before you can change your email address.
A verification email has been sent to the new email address. Please click the link in the email to complete the change.
Your email address has been changed.
This process usually takes less than a minute, and allows Alight Motion to make best use of video on your device.
These results indicate the maximum number of video layers supported by your device for export. Actual preview play capabilities may be less than this.

"This can happen for several reasons, including:
• The video format may not be supported by your device • The video resolution may be too high for editing on your device • There may be too many video clips in use at the same time (some devices are limited to 2 or 4 video clips at the same time depending on the resolution) • Another app or service (such as a screen recorder or video player) might be using the video decoder
Error code: %1$d Detected at: %2$s"
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Find the countdown in your My Account page.
Are you sure you want to skip this offer?
Create without limits with a %1$d%% discount!

"Your crash tracking ID:
%s
Please send this ID to Alight Creative support for further assistance."
Width and height must be between 32 and 4096
Learn how the Creator Program works
Learn how the Creator Program works
You do not have enough tokens to redeem this reward.
Please specify the website from which you would like to receive the gift card
Make sure your phone number is connected to a Tokopedia and a GoPay account.
Please insert an Indonesian phone number
Share your Alight Motion Templates with friends and followers to earn tokens. Use tokens to redeem shopping vouchers or a pro subscription!

"- 🤝Join our creator program - 🎨 Create stunning Alight Motion templates - 🔥 Share your templates - 💯 Earn tokens when your template is imported - 🎁 Redeem tokens for shopping vouchers or Alight Motion Pro"
"- 💻 Join our creator program - 🚀 Share your Alight Motion Templates - 💯 Earn tokens for each user who imports your templates - 🛒 Redeem tokens for shopping vouchers or Alight Motion PRO"
Sending the reward could take up to 7 days.
Share your creativity and earn rewards with Alight Motion!
The Creator Program has been temporarily suspended. Thanks for your patience.
By tapping “Accept and Continue” you accept the {tos}Additional Terms for the Creator Program{/tos} and acknowledge receipt of our {pp}Privacy Policy{/pp}.
Your account has been banned from the Top Creators Ranking due to policy violations. If you believe this ban was issued in error, please contact customer support.
Promote your Social Media profiles in the ranking
Edit your social media links displayed in the ranking.
Learn how the Top Creators Ranking works
You are now listed among our Top Creators. Tap below to find out your current ranking position!
Are you sure you want to leave the Top Creators Ranking? Your profile and Social Media links will no longer be visible to other users in the ranking.
Create and share stunning templates to climb the monthly ranking!
Boost your social media visibility and become a Top Creator!
We are sorry for the inconvenience.
The Top Creators Ranking has been temporarily suspended.
By tapping “Accept and Continue” you accept the {tos}Additional Terms for the Top Creators Ranking,{/tos} and acknowledge receipt of our {pp}Privacy Policy{/pp}.
Share your stunning templates and climb the ranking to become one of our Top Creators, recognized and celebrated by millions of Alight Motion users!

Attention all creatives! Want to earn rewards for your amazing creations? Join our Creator Program and start sharing your templates to earn tokens. You can redeem them for shopping vouchers or a pro subscription. Share your talent with the world and get rewarded for your skills!
"Please don't delete the lines below. They will help us better identify your problem."
I understand and still wish to delete my account.

Certain data may be retained in our records for some time after your account is deleted. Please refer to the Alight Creative [a href=https://alightcreative.com/privacy/]Privacy Policy[/a] for more information.
Something went wrong when trying to delete your account. Please check your network connection or try again later.
You must authenticate again before you can delete your account.
After deleting your account, if you try to sign in, a new account will be automatically created.

You have purchased a subscription via the Google Play Store. Deleting your account will not cancel your subscription. You will be able to use your subscription on an Android device after signing in with the Google Play Store account you used to purchase your subscription. To cancel your subscription, please visit the Google Play Store.

You have purchased a subscription via the Apple App Store. Deleting your account will not cancel your subscription. You will be able to use your subscription on an iPhone, iPad, or Mac after signing in with the App Store account you used to purchase your subscription. To cancel your subscription, please visit the App Store.
"IMPORTANT INFORMATION Please read this before deleting your account."
Do you want to delete this project from the cloud?

Please note that we may still retain some data relating to your use of our services. If you want to delete all your personal data, contact the Privacy team following the instructions contained in our Privacy Policy.
The media browser will only show media in albums or folders with Demo in the name.
Changes to a user interface color scheme based on neutral greys, which may improve color judgement for some content.
Do you want to download it again?
This project is already saved locally
"We were unable to download your project from the cloud. Check your connection and make sure the project wasn't deleted from the cloud."
We were unable to read this project. Make sure you are using the latest version of Alight Motion
This package contains one or more %1$dx%2$d video files, but this device only supports editing of video up to %3$dp.
"Download in progress... Please don't close the app or this screen."
This property animation includes advanced easing, which is only available to Alight Motion Members. You can edit the easing anyway, but you will need a membership to export or share the project.
This effect is only available to Alight Motion Members. You can edit the effect properties anyway, but you will need a membership to export or share the project.
Swipe here to add a new point
Swipe here to position next point; tap here to place it.

Reorients a 360º photo or video in equirectangular format.This effect interprets the layer as an equirectangular photo or video, projects it onto a sphere, rotates the sphere, and then projects the sphere back into equirectangular format. The result is as if the original camera that recorded the 360º image or video had been positioned at a different angle.
Projects a 360º photo or video onto a flat surface, as if viewed from within the 360º sphere.

"Keys out pixels based on how closely they match or don't match a group of colors, making the keyed out parts of the layer transparent. This is similar to the Chroma Key effect but offers more precise control and more color options. Useful for greenscreening or bluescreening."
Bends the layer along a circular arc.
Automatically adjusts the opacity of the layer, alternating between its normal value and zero over time.
Multiplies randomly generated rectangular blocks of noise with the existing colors of opaque parts of the layer.
Renders a faux-3D box using the layer as a surface texture.
For a smoother blur, try Gaussian Blur.
Blurs the layer by averaging the colors of nearby pixels in a surrounding rectangular area (hence box blur).
More iterations give better quality, but slower preview performance. We recommend 2 iterations.
Adjusts the brightness or contrast of the layer.
Uses a height map to model bumps or perturbations in the surface of the layer, then applies simulated lighting and shading.
Remaps the red, green, blue, and alpha channels in the layer.
Remaps the hue, saturation, value, and alpha channels in the layer.
Splits the red, green and blue channels of the layer, keeping one fixed in position and shifting the other two channels in opposite directions.
Renders a checkerboard pattern in the opaque parts of the layer.
Randomly removes grid-aligned rectangular pieces from the layer by making them transparent. Keyframe animation can be applied to remove progressively more and more rectangles over time.
Keys out all pixels similar to a particular color, making those parts of the layer transparent. Useful for greenscreening or bluescreening.
Applies a radial blur to the layer resulting in a zoom-in and zoom-out effect, dynamically adjusting the strength of the blur for each color channel.
Distorts the layer in a pattern concentric circles around a center point, similar to the ripples caused by a pebble dropped in water.
Renders a procedurally generated cloud pattern in the opaque parts of the layer.
Makes targeted adjustments to the Red, Green, and Blue channels based on shadows, midtones, and highlights.
Changes the color of the layer, keeping the original luminance.

Corrects a photo or video so it appears as if illuminated by a light source with a different color temperature. Useful for changing the mood of a scene or correcting for the wrong illumination or white balance.

Smoothly tune the color of dark and light parts of a photo or video segmented by lift, gamma, and gain. Use this to achieve various color looks, to change the mood of the video, or to match the color of different takes.
Renders strips of thin paper-like material, layered front to back, using the layer luminance or opacity as a height map for each strip.
Renders a gradient around the contours of the opaque parts of the layer.
Draws one or more lines around the contours of the opaque parts of the layer.

Copies the background into the layer, effectively turning the layer into an adjustment layer. Effects applied to the layer after this will apply to the background pixels covered by the opaque parts of the layer.

This effect copies the pixels behind this layer into the current layer. Use this together with other effects to apply them to the background. For example, to use Box Blur after applying Copy Background to blur the background.
Replaces existing numbers in a text layer with the same number added to or multiplied with a fixed value. Useful for creating animations that count up or down.
Renders a faux-3D cube using the layer as a surface texture.
Deforms the layer by curling it into a circular shape from one end.
Renders a faux-3D cylinder using the layer as a surface texture.
Creates dark blooms around darker areas within a photo or video layer based on a luminance threshold.
Blurs the layer by averaging nearby pixel colors along a specified angle, similar to the blur caused by motion in a fixed direction.
Displaces pixels in the background based on the color of pixels in the layer.
Angularly displaces pixels in the background based on the color of pixels in the layer.
Randomly removes pixels in the layer. This effect can be animated to create a pixel dissolve transition.

Draws a pattern of random dots in the opaque parts of the layer. Each dot is placed randomly, but the randomness is controlled so that the overall distribution of dots when taken together is approximately uniform.
Clips the beginning and end of the vector outline of the layer so that the outline is only partially drawn.
Creates one or more copies or echoes of the layer as it appeared or will appear at different points in time, based only on keyframe animation applied to the layer.
Detects edges in a photo or video and creates a glow around them.
Creates a glowing energy-like outline and optional contour lines around the opaque parts of the layer, which can be animated to look like arcs of electricity.
Renders a faux-3D ellipsoid using the layer as a surface texture.
Renders a beam of energy between two points within the layer.
Adjusts the exposure, gamma curve, and luminance offset of photo and video layers.
Automatically animates the layer opacity to fade the layer in at its beginning, and out again at its end.
More iterations give better quality, but slower preview performance. We recommend 3 iterations.
Tap *** next to any effect to add it to your favorites.
Softens the edges of the opaque part of the layer by blurring the alpha channel.

Fills the area behind the layer with a modified copy of the layer, with optional adjustments such as blur, saturation, tint, and brightness, providing a convenient way to quickly adapt a photo or video for use in a project with a different aspect ratio or orientation.
Finds edges in a photo or video layer by detecting sharp changes in luminance between nearby pixels.
Randomly flickers the layer by automatically adjusting the opacity over time.
Flips the layer in 3D along a specified axis.
Overlays the opaque parts of the layer with a gradient made between four individually positioned colors.
Distorts the layer using a procedurally generated fractal pattern. Useful for simulating distortions caused by real-world phenomena such as fire, water, and heat.
Applies a fast, smooth blur to the layer using a gaussian function, reducing noise and details in the layer.
Renders the layer as if the opaque parts were made of beveled glass, refracting the background and overlaying specular highlights.
Draws a glow around the outside of the opaque parts of the layer.
Draws a glow along the inside edges of the opaque parts the layer.
Renders a blur combined with a smooth glow within a region of the layer defined by a luminance band.
Maps colors in the layer onto a gradient based on their lightness.
Overlays the opaque parts of the layer with a gradient.
Overlays the opaque parts of the layer with grid lines.

Builds up multiple layers of simulated grunge, grime, spots, specks, stains and blemishes within the center and inner edges of the layer based on preset textures or grains, creating an aged, worn, or textured look to the layer.
Replaces continuous tones in the layer with a pattern of monochrome dots of varying sizes, similar to the process used in newspaper or comic book printing.
Replaces continuous tones in the layer with a pattern of dots of varying sizes for each CMYK color channel, similar to the process used in magazine or comic book printing.
Replaces continuous tones in the layer with a pattern of monochrome lines of varying thickness, a variation of the process used in newspaper or comic book printing.
Renders a faux-3D heart using the layer as a surface texture.
Covers opaque parts of the layer in an array of hexagons.
Renders a faux-3D hexagonal prism using the layer as a surface texture.
Divides the layer into a grid of hexagonal tiles and rotates the pixels in each tile independently.
Divides the layer into a grid of hexagonal tiles and shifts the contents of each tile in a random direction.
Repeats the layer in a pattern of hexagonal tiles, filling the screen.
Independently adjusts the intensity of the lightest and darkest parts of the layer.
Renders a faux-3D hollow box, using the layer as a surface texture, with sides that can be turned on or off, punched out with preset shapes, or offset outward.
Remaps a grayscale image (or luminance values of a color image) into an intense color ramp based on two selected hues.
Rotates the color hues in the layer.
Blurs the opaque parts of the layer without blurring the opacity.
"Inverts the layer's red, green, or blue channels independently."
Renders a flowing iridescent pattern in opaque parts of the layer.
Automatically jumps the layer randomly back and forth over time, along a selected angle.
Creates symmetric radial reflections of the layer.

Cleans up greenscreen or bluescreen spill near the edges of a layer, such as the green fringe left over after applying a matte effect such a Chroma Key, by isolating a feathered region around the inside of the edges of the layer and propagating interior hue and saturation outward into the isolated region while maintaining the original luminance.
Applies an angular blur to the layer, excluding the central area.
Renders a lens flare in the layer.
Creates a soft glow and optional halo around the lighter areas within a photo or video layer based on a luminance threshold.
Renders fractal arcs of lightning between two points in the layer.
Creates line-shaped streaks by sliding the layer at an angle and blending together overlapping pixels.
Renders long parallel shadows extending from opaque parts of the layer.

Extracts a mask from the layer based on the brightness of pixels in the layer, optionally clipping out noise in the extreme light and dark areas of the layer, then uses the mask to stamp a solid color into the project.
Keys out all pixels lighter than or darker than a given threshold, making those parts of the layer transparent.
Makes the layer transparent and magnifies the area behind the layer, as if the layer were a magnifying glass.
Blurs the background behind the layer, with the blur strength based on the layer luminance.
Expands the transparent parts of the layer, shrinking the opaque parts.

Isolates a narrow feathered strip around the interior edge of the layer and replaces the hue and saturation in that strip with the hue and saturation behind the layer, keeping the original luminance. Use this after applying a matte or key effect to reduce stray colors in the edge of the matte.

"Simulates motion blur by blurring the layer based on position, rotation, and scale keyframe animation from the layer's Move & Transform settings, as well as motion from certain other effects that are compatible with motion blur."
To use: Animate the layer using Move & Transform (blur will be applied automatically).
Overlays the layer with a copy of itself mirrored along either the horizontal or vertical axis, with optional alpha and blending mode control.
Divides the layer into array of squares and averages the color of each square, resulting in a pixelated look.
Positions the layer at a point partway way along the outline path of the layer immediately beneath.
Blends random noise with the opaque parts of the layer.
Renders a faux-3D regular octahedron using the layer as a surface texture.
Offsets the layer content, wrapping at the edges of the bounding box of the layer.

Renders a photo or video layer with a limited palette using error diffusion, but damping or exaggerating the quantization errors to create intentional distortions. Individual images become unrecognizable, but action can be seen in the moving aggregate. This effect is based on the Omino Suite, with special thanks to David Van Brink.

Renders the layer as though it were made of glass, with refraction and a glossy contour, and chromatic aberration based on segmentation of the visible spectrum into seven regions. The layer luminance may optionally be used as a height map. This effect is based on the Omino Suite, with special thanks to David Van Brink.
Moves the layer back and forth repeatedly.
Curls a corner of the layer upwards as if the layer were made of paper or thin plastic.
Maps pixel colors in the layer to the closest matching color in a palette.
"Adjusts how the layer's scale and rotation react to changes in the parent's scale and rotation."
To use: Parent this layer to another using Layer Parenting (this effect shoud be applied to a child layer)
Distorts the layer by pinching it towards the center or expanding it outward.
Distorts the layer by pinching it towards the center or expanding it outwards, without affecting the edges or opacity of the layer.
Decreases the layer resolution so that individual pixels become visible, sampling at the centers of the pixels, and drawing each pixel with an optional vignette.
Renders a faux-3D three-axis cross using the layer as a surface texture.
Warps the layer by mapping from cartesian coordinates to polar coordinates.
"Decreases the number of step in the layer's color channels."
Performs a slow but precise box blur of the layer.
Automatically grows and shrinks the layer repeatedly over time, based on a sine wave or triangular wave.
Automatically pulses the layer opacity over time, based on a sine wave or triangular wave.
Renders a faux-3D regular pyramid with a square base, using the layer as a surface texture.
Overlays multiple solid-color radial rays in the opaque parts of the layer.
Renders long shadows radiating away from a point, based on the opaque parts of the layer.
Masks out a region of the layer bounded by two radial lines.

Renders a faux-3D raster extrusion of the layer based on the opaque and transparent pixels within the layer, using the opaque parts of the layer as a surface texture for the front and back of the extrusion.
Scales, rotates, or offsets the layer, much like Move & Transform, but after rasterization and after applying any preceding effects on the layer, allowing the output of effects to be transformed.
Increase precision for better edge quality; decrease for faster preview performance. For best results, an precision between 30 and 60 is recommended.
Use more iterations for better edge quality; use less iterations for faster preview performance. For best results, an iteration count between 30 and 60 is recommended.
Renders light rays from bright parts of the layer, based on the threshold setting.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer, arranged in a grid.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer, arranged along a line.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer along the outline path of the layer immediately beneath.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer, arranged in a circular pattern.
Dynamically generates multiple copies of the layer, scattered randomly around the original layer location.
Replaces one color in the layer with another.
Adjusts the gamma curve of the red, green, and blue channels independently.
Remixes the red, green and blue channels in the layer.
Renders a twisted, flowing ribbon of varying width in the opaque parts of the layer.
Renders a procedurally generated pattern of turbulent ridges in the opaque parts of the layer.
Renders a faux-3D ring with flat faces, using the layer as a surface texture.
Roughens the edges of the opaque parts of the layer.
Applies additional layer scale on top of the scale set in Move & Transform.
Scatters copies of the layer within an infinite 3D field while hiding the original layer, and allows simulated motion within the field in three dimensions through keyframe animation.
Moves the layer randomly over time within specified parameters.
Enhances details in the layer by increasing the contrast wherever there are abrupt differences in the luminance of nearby pixels in the layer.
Renders a simple parallax starfield pattern, with a depth component, in the opaque parts of the layer.
Automatically moves the layer smoothly but randomly over time
Smooths the edges of the opaque parts of a layer without affecting the pixel colors within the layer.
Draws a smooth curved bevel inside the edges of the opaque parts of the layer.
Creates a soft Gaussian-based glow within a photo or video layer, or around the outside edge of any layer.
Fills the opaque parts of the layer with a solid color.
Composites the layer on a solid color matte, filling transparent parts of the layer with a solid background color.
Maps each color in the layer into a custom spectrum of colors based on the brightness of the original color.
Renders a faux-3D sphere, interpreting the layer as an equirectangular projection and using it as a surface texture for the sphere.
Automatically spins the layer at a given speed.
Applies an angular blur to the layer, as though it were spinning.
Creates arc-shaped streaks by spinning the layer around a point and blending together overlapping pixels.
Keeps one color while decreasing the saturation of other colors in the layer.
Distorts the layer by squeezing it along one axis while expanding it along the other axis.
Renders an individual star in the current layer.
Renders a faux-3D star polyhedron using the layer as a surface texture.
Renders a complex parallax starfield that can be animated in two dimensions.
Renders a faux-3D star prism using the layer as a surface texture.
Divides the layer into strips of equal size, then stretches the middle row of pixels in each one to fill the entire strip, resulting in streaks of color.
Stretches the layer in an arbitrary direction.
Slices the layer along an angle and then moves the pieces apart, stretching the pixels between them.
Renders a pattern of stripes in the opaque parts of the layer.
Tapers the strokes of a freehand drawing layer.
Automatically rotates the layer back and forth over time.
Warps the layer by rotating it different amounts based on the distance from a center-point, resulting in a vortex or whirlpool-like distortion.
Partially displays a text layer, character by character.
Randomly changes individual characters in a text layer.
Adjusts the spacing between individual letters or between lines of text in a text layer.
Transforms individual letters, words, lines, or pieces of letters within a specified range of a text layer.
Converts the layer to black and white with a hard cutoff at the specified luminance threshold.
Divides the layer into a grid of tiles and rotates the pixels in each tile independently.
Repeats the layer in a tile pattern, filling the screen.
Divides the layer into a grid of tiles and shifts the contents of each tile in a random direction.
Replaces the text in the layer with a running timecode.
Causes time to pass in steps, but just for this layer.
To use: Animate the layer using keyframe animation with other effects or properties (echoes will be created based on keyframe animation).
Renders a faux-3D torus using the layer as a surface texture.
Renders a round faux-3D tunnel using the layer as the interior surface texture.
Renders smooth patterns of procedurally-generated fractal noise in the opaque parts of the layer, useful for simulating real-world phenomena like clouds, or for use as a luminance map.

Distorts the layer along selected coordinate axes using a random pattern of smooth fractal noise. Distortion may be along one or more axis in either cartesian or polar coordinate space. Useful for simulating distortions caused by real-world phenomena such as fire, water, and heat, or for modeling real-world objects that are naturally irregular such as mountains.
Enhances the perceptual sharpness or acutance of a photo or video by increasing local contrast near edges, while avoiding changes to areas that were originally smooth.
Adjusts the saturation or purity of colors in the layer.
Vibrance is a milder saturation boost that affects only midrange colors without causing over-saturation. It is best used with video or photographic images.
Darkens the edges of the layer.
Renders procedurally-generated pattern of Voronoi cells based on randomly placed points.
Warp Blur creates a paintbrush-like streaky distortion of a layer by blurring along gradients of a fractal noise field.
Distorts the layer based on a sine wave.
Masks out rectangular segments from opposite sides of the layer. Use keyframe animation to create a wipe transition.
Applies a radial blur to the layer, as though zooming in or out.
Creates radial streaks by scaling the layer around a point and blending together overlapping pixels.
There are no projects uploaded into the cloud
There are no elements in your collection
Start creating your first project to upload it to the cloud
When enabled, slow finger movements on the Move and Transform controlpad will translate to shorter pixel distances, allowing for more precise control.
An error occurred. Pull down to retry.
Subscribe or delete enough projects to respect the %1$s limit to download files
"You don't have access to cloud services"
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Offer expires in less than one hour.
Cannot export an empty project. Add some media to your project before sharing.

"Something went wrong while trying to render and encode your content for sharing.
For suggestions on how to solve this problem, please see: %s"
Please free some space on your device, then try exporting again
Please free some space on your %d, then try exporting again
Please do not leave Alight Motion or lock your screen while export is in progress.

"This option allows you to generate a link and QR code meant for sharing your project with others.
For privacy concerns and size limitations, consider using placeholder media from the Sample Media folder."
This project is too short to export.
You are now an Alight Motion member! Please check My Account for details.
Your profile changes could not be saved. Please check your network connection or try again later.
Failed to save QR-Code image. Reason(%s)
Connect to the internet for the latest Alight Motion news, information, and tutorials.

"The following fonts could not be imported.
This can happen if a file is not a font, or is a font format that your operating system does not support."
The font you selected is not available. Please check your internet connection.
To import external fonts, Alight Motion requires access to your storage.
Some fonts are not available because there is no network connection.
A new version of this app is available. Please update to the latest version.
Follow the instructions sent to %1$s to recover your password.
Confirm email to continue sign in

"You originally intended to connect %1$s to your email account but have opened the link on a different device where you are not signed in.
If you still want to connect your %1$s account, open the link on the same device where you started sign-in. Otherwise, tap Continue to sign-in on this device."
The session associated with this sign-in request has either expired or was cleared.
A sign-in email with additional instructions was sent to %1$s. Check your email to complete sign-in.
The action code is invalid. This can happen if the code is malformed, expired, or has already been used.

"Try these common fixes: • Check if the email was marked as spam or filtered. • Check your internet connection. • Check that you did not misspell your email. • Check that your inbox space is not running out or other inbox setting related issues. "
Try opening the link using the same device or browser where you started the sign-in process.
Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
"That email address doesn't match an existing account"
There was a problem verifying your phone number
This code is no longer valid
This phone number has been used too many times
Enter your email address to continue
Please enter a first and last name.
Network error, check your internet connection.
Get instructions sent to this email that explain how to reset your password.
By tapping “%1$s”, an SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.
By tapping “%1$s”, you are indicating that you accept our %2$s and %3$s. An SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.
By continuing, you are indicating that you accept our %1$s and %2$s.

"You've already used %1$s. You can connect your %2$s account with %1$s by signing in with email link below.
For this flow to successfully connect your %2$s account with this email, you have to open the link on the same device or browser."
"You've already used %1$s. Sign in with %2$s to continue."
"You've already used %1$s to sign in. Enter your password for that account."
You must sign in to import.
Create a project with Alight Motion
Use a template with Alight Motion
Please enter a value between 1 and 99999.
Add Images, Video, Audio, Shapes, Text, Drawings and other layers to your project.
Adjust layer position, color and other properties with editing panels such as Move & Transform.
Add keyframes to animate any property of any layer.
Export as a video, GIF, or a project package that anyone with Alight Motion can edit.
Share to Instagram, YouTube and many of your favorite apps!
Working in Alight Motion is as simple as Add, Adjust, Animate!
Reward will not be received before video completion.

To import fonts into Alight Motion, simply use the Files app to copy a .ttf or .otf file into the Alight Motion folder on your phone, then check the Imported Fonts category in the Alight Motion font browser.
You must be signed in before importing a project package.

This version of Alight Motion is not compatible with your device. Please download the latest official version from the Google Play Store. If you still encounter any difficulties, please contact support-android@alightmotion.com and include a screenshot of this screen.
Your payment is in progress. Premium features will be activated once the transaction has been completed.

"Used to track the app's traffic and performance, the most and least popular features, and how you navigate the app. The tracking technologies used may be set by us or our third-party partners. By not opting-in to this processing, you will not lose access to any features."
To analyze app usage and trends
By clicking Get Started, you accept our {tos_link}Terms of Service{/tos_link} and agree to essential processing.
For more information, please see our {pp_link}Privacy Policy{/pp_link}.

"To provide services, we collect and use your personal information as follows:
Purposes of data collection:
• To provide and improve our services • To personalize content and ads • To analyze app usage and trends
Types of data collected:
• Device and app data • Usage data • IP address and location • Identifiers such as User ID • Ad data
Retention and use period:
Your personal data will be retained as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes above, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
You can choose for which non-essential purposes we process your data."

Used to provide customized services and advertising based on the data you share and your in-app behavior, and to measure the effectiveness of our ads. The tracking technologies used may be set by us or our third-party partners. By not opting-in to this processing, you will not receive personalized ads.
Essential for the app to function correctly or used only by us to perform aggregated statistical analysis.
To provide and improve our services
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month

"Drag in preview: add a pivot keyframe.
⇧Drag in preview: move all pivot keyframes"

"Drag in preview: move current pivot keyframe
⇧Drag in preview: move all pivot keyframes"

"Drag in preview: add a position keyframe.
⇧Drag in preview: move all position keyframes"

"Drag in preview: move current position keyframe
⇧Drag in preview: move all position keyframes"
"Drag in preview: add keyframe for selected point ⇧Drag in preview: move all keyframes for selected point"
"Click in preview: add point Drag in preview: add curve"
"Drag in preview: move current keyframe for selected point ⇧Drag in preview: move all keyframes for selected point"

Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

Animate the point-of-view within your scene to create dynamic motion!

Change the blending mode to control how a layer combines with layers behind it.
Anticipate change. Ease in and out of motion to make it more natural.

This project uses audio from the iTunes Library, which must be re-encoded for package sharing. To avoid a loss of quality from re-encoding in the future, please consider keeping audio files in the Alight Motion folder instead of the iTunes Library

You selected a payment method which does not execute the transaction immediately. You may need to take additional action to finish the purchase. Your benefits will be granted automatically once the transaction is completed.

We use tracking technologies that either are essential for the app to function correctly or are used to produce aggregated statistics. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to improve the in-app experience. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to Privacy Settings" at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap X in the top corner of the screen.
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

We use tracking technologies that are essential for the app to function correctly. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to produce statistics, improve the in-app experience, and to provide you with personalized services and content. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to In-app tracking preferences at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap Refuse".
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

We use tracking technologies that either are essential for the app to function correctly or are used to produce aggregated statistics. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to improve the in-app experience, and to provide you with personalized services and targeted advertising. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to Privacy Settings" at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap X in the top corner of the screen.
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

We use tracking technologies that either are essential for the app to function correctly or are used to produce aggregated statistics. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to improve the in-app experience, and to provide you with personalized services. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to Privacy Settings" at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap X in the top corner of the screen.
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

We use tracking technologies that either are essential for the app to function correctly or are used to produce aggregated statistics. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to improve the in-app experience, and to provide you with personalized services and targeted advertising. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to Privacy Settings at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap Refuse".
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

We use tracking technologies that either are essential for the app to function correctly or are used to produce aggregated statistics. With your consent, we and our third-party partners will also use tracking technologies to improve the in-app experience, and to provide you with personalized services and targeted advertising. To give your consent, tap Accept All and Continue".
Alternatively, you can customize your privacy settings by tapping "Customize Preferences, or by going to Privacy Settings at any time. If you don’t want us to use non-technical tracking technologies, tap Refuse".
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.
Alight Creative Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

Your use of the Alight Motion application is governed by the Alight Motion Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. By signing in, you also agree to the collection of personal information relating to your account, as detailed in the privacy policy.
By continuing, you accept our {tos_link}Terms of Service{/tos_link} and acknowledge receipt of our {privacy_link}Privacy Policy{/privacy_link}.

"We're updating our {tos_link}Terms of Service{/tos_link} and {privacy_link}Privacy Policy{/privacy_link}. The new Terms of Service are effective as of %s, and continuing to use the app after that date means that you accept them. You can accept them now by tapping the button below. If you don't agree to the new terms, you'll need to stop using the app before that date. You can learn more about how we process your personal data in our updated Privacy Policy."
I agree to the updated terms
Alight Creative Privacy Policy and Terms of Service Update
The Terms of Service and Privacy Policy that govern your use of the Alight Motion application have been updated. Please review and agree to the updated terms to continue using the application.

"Please type here your Privacy Request:
Please don't delete the lines below and don't remove the email addresses you find in To and Cc. They will help us to verify your identity and to process your request."
Used to track the app’s traffic and performance, the most and least popular features, and how you navigate the app. These trackers may be set by us or our third-party partners.

"With your consent, we and our third-party partners will use the following in-app tracking technologies. You can choose which non-technical tracking technologies we use.
For more information about how we process your personal data through tracking technologies, take a look at our "Privacy Policy.

Used to provide customized services and advertising based on the data you share and your in-app behavior, and to measure the effectiveness of our ads. These trackers may be set by us or our third-party partners.

Please enter a value between 32 and 4096.
A smaller version of this package is available for importing with optimized lower-quality media.

"This option uploads a package to Alight Cloud containing the project and all required original media files.
After upload, you receive a permanent link that you can share with others to download the project into Alight Motion on any device. Only people with the link can access the project."
For faster upload and download times, consider using media from the Sample Media folder if you are making templates.
An alternate version of this package is available for importing without a membership, using placeholder media instead of the original media.
"This project is not compatible with your version of Alight Motion. We're very sorry for the inconvenience."
Use this link to import the package into Alight Motion.

"This link can be used to import the project on any device running Alight Motion. Share the link with others to allow them to access the project.

Alight Motion was unable to check your membership status. Please check your internet connection and make sure you are signed in to the %1$s app, or try again later.
Get an Alight Motion Premium Membership!

Payment will be charged to your Apple account. Your subscription will automatically renew according to your selected schedule unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. After purchase, you can manage subscriptions in your Apple ID settings.
Unlimited access to premium features and the members-only effect pack (%d effects + more added regularly!)
"Unlimited access to premium features and the regularly-updated members-only effect pack is just a tap away! (We'll also take off the watermark!)"
Help us keep improving Alight Motion! Your membership comes with unlimited premium features, no watermark, and the members-only effect pack.
Be a Motion Design Pro! Spice up your videos with unlimited access to premium features and members-only effects!
Unlimited access to premium features, %d members-only effects (more added regularly) and no ads!

We care deeply about user satisfaction, and your feedback helps us make Alight Motion better.
Would you mind giving us feedback?

Would you consider rating Alight Motion?"
"If you close the ad now you won't get the reward."
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?

"With this button, you can save a certain combination of properties and effects as a preset, so you can later reuse it on other layers!
Saved presets will be added below. To apply a saved preset to a layer, select that layer, tap Presets, and tap again on the preset you want to apply.
Effects and keyframes will adapt to the length of your new layer without replacing your media or color fill."
Use this link or QR code to share your project with others.
During the beta test period, you can use Alight Motion without the watermark at no charge by turning off this option. You must be signed in for this setting to be available.
You must be signed in to your Alight Motion account in order to share a project package.
Please sign in with the account that is linked to your membership.
A sign-in email has been sent to your current email address. Please check your email to complete the re-authentication process.
Free for a week, then %1$s for a week, then %2$s/week.
Free for 7 days, then %1$s for a week. Renews at %2$s/week.
Free for a week, then %1$s for a week, then %2$s/year.
Free for 7 days, then %1$s for a week. Renews at %2$s/year.
All the Pro features of Alight Motion, without ads.
Alight Motion PRO - edit with no limits
Alight Motion requires access to your media in order to save to the gallery.
You have exceeded the maximum quota.
Fine-tune photo and video colors to express the mood of a scene or match colors across takes.
Desktop-quality pro visual effects with just a touch-now on mobile!
Motion graphics in any aspect ratio, from square to widescreen!
Get the feeling you want with a variety of layer blending modes!
Illustrate whatever you can imagine, then bring it to life!
Share with your friends or push to a pro workflow. MP4 Video, GIF Animation, PNG Sequence, XML Project Sharing, and more.
More than 2,000 fonts included, or import your own custom fonts.
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Apple. Next renewal: %1$s
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Apple. Order Number: %1$s.
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Apple. Order number: %1$s. Next renewal: %2$s.
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Google Play. Next renewal: %1$s
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Google Play. Order Number: %1$s.
Subscription renews automatically. Payments are processed by Google Play. Order number: %1$s. Next renewal: %2$s.
Purchases are processed by Google. Subscriptions automatically renew until cancelled in the Google Play Store. See alightmotion.com/sub for details.
Subscription will not renew automatically. Subscription ends: %1$s.
Subscription will not renew automatically. Order number: %1$s. Subscription ends: %2$s.

"When you subscribe:
- You’ll automatically be charged each renewal period depending on your subscription terms. - If you accept a trial offer, you'll get an email when your trial is about to end. - At the end of your trial period, you’ll automatically get charged the amount in your subscription terms. - To avoid charges, cancel the subscription before the trial period expires. - You might find a payment authorization on your payment method up to 24 hours before the renewal date but you’ll only be charged on the renewal date. To remove the payment authorization, cancel the subscription before the renewal date.
You can cancel your subscription at any time {subLink}in the subscriptions section on Google Play{/subLink}. When you cancel your subscription, you’ll lose access to the subscription at the end of the current billing period.
You can manage your subscriptions and turn off auto-renewal by going to your Account Settings after the purchase and following these steps:
1. Go to {playStoreLink}play.google.com{/playStoreLink}. 2. At the top right, click your profile icon. 3. Click {bold}Payments & subscriptions > Subscriptions{/bold}. 4. Next to the subscription you want to cancel, select {bold}Manage{/bold}. 5. In the confirmation pop-up, click {bold}Cancel subscription{/bold}.
Uninstalling the app will not cancel your subscription."
Swipe here to move pivot point
System fonts are not included when sharing project packages. Projects may appear differently if imported on a device with different system fonts.

"If you exit now, you’ll lose any progress made so far.
Stay in this editor to easily replace template media with your own."

"Once you continue, you won’t be able to go back.
Stay in this editor to easily replace template media with your own."
"The last frame of your video was frozen because the video was too short. Replace with a longer video for best results."
Tap to scale media: fit, stretch, or fill
Tap to replace with your media
This element is linked to another project.

"%s
Controls whether the image of a layer fills the thumbnail completely or is positioned based on its actual location within the project."
You must be signed in to your Alight Motion account in order to share a Template
Tap on the current time to create a bookmark. Long press to see other options.
"To see from the camera's point of view, open this panel and turn on Active Camera View."
Firebase is a tool provided by Google which is essential for the app to work properly. When analytics features are enabled, it can help us to improve app’s traffic and performance.
Adjust is a mobile attribution tool. It helps us to measure the effectiveness of our ads.
Our internal profiling software development kit (SDK). It allows us to provide customized services.
Firebase is a tool provided by Google which is essential for the app to work properly. When profiling features are enabled, it can help us to measure the effectiveness of our ads.
%s allows us to show you advertising. When profiling features are enabled, advertising is customized according to your preferences.
Unable to reach server. Please check your connection and try again later.
Before unlinking a sign-in option, you must have a verified email address. Please use the Change button to set or verify your email address.
Changes to your username or profile photo have not been saved yet. Do you wish to discard the changes and exit?
The video format is not supported.
"File: %1$s Video Format: %2$s Audio Format: %3$s Profile: %4$d Level: %5$d Size: %6$dx%7$d Frame Rate: %8$sfps Bit Rate: %9$d Duration: %10$s"

"Upload in progress... Please don't close the app or this screen."
Do you want to overwrite the project in the cloud or create a new one?
This project is already saved in the cloud

"This package is %1$s. Packages over %2$s can only be imported by other Alight Motion members.
If you are making this for use as a template or preset, please consider replacing any placeholder media used in the package with smaller media.
Do you want to upload and share this package anyway?"
This package is %1$s, and can only be imported by other Alight Motion members.

"A smaller version of this package for other users could not be prepared.
To enable this package to be imported by all users, please reduce the size to less than %1$s."
A smaller version of this package with optimized lower-quality media will be available for import by other users.

"This package is %1$s. Packages over %2$s can only be imported by other Alight Motion members.
If you are making this for use as a template or preset, please consider replacing any placeholder media used in the package with media from the Sample Media folder, which does not count towards the project size."

If you are making this for use as a template or preset, please consider replacing any placeholder media used in the package with media from the Sample Media folder, which does not count towards the project size.

To avoid this warning in the future, if you are making this for use as a template or preset, please consider replacing any placeholder media used in the package with media from the Sample Media folder, which does not count towards the project size.
Video resolution is too high for editing on this device

"WARNING! Sharing your crash tracking ID with Alight Creative means that crashes reported by this device will not be anonymous.
Crash reports may occasionally include private data such as filenames.
You should use this option with caution, and only with the guidance of Alight Creative Support."
Be sure to watch the Getting Started videos, and check out our YouTube channel for more helpful tutorials.
Watch this space for tips, tricks, tutorials, and inspirational ideas.
Thank you for using Alight Motion, the first motion graphics app ever created for a smartphone.
